PlantVillage.citation: Hughes, D. P., & Salathé, M. (2015). An open access repository of images on plant health to enable the development of mobile disease diagnostics. arXiv:1511.08060.
PlantVillage.imaging_conditions: Controlled lab: uniform backgrounds, consistent lighting, single leaf per image.
PlantVillage.role_in_project: PRIMARY TRAINING DATA — SSL pretraining + supervised fine-tuning (PEFT experiments).
PlantVillage.justification: PlantVillage is the largest publicly available annotated plant disease dataset, providing the scale necessary for ViT-based SSL pretraining. Its 38-class coverage across 14 crop species defines a broad disease taxonomy for a foundational model.

lab_bias.description: All images captured under controlled laboratory conditions.
lab_bias.implication_for_research: Directly motivates RQ4: cross-domain transfer to PlantDoc. Model may learn background artefacts rather than disease features.

class_imbalance.implication_for_research: Macro-F1 is the primary metric (not accuracy). All splits are stratified.

single_leaf_framing.description: Single isolated leaf per image — no multi-leaf scenes.
single_leaf_framing.implication_for_research: Model may not generalise to multi-leaf field images. Acknowledged as a project limitation in the dissertation.

PlantDoc.citation: Singh, D., Jain, N., Jain, P., Kayal, P., Kumawat, S., & Batra, N. (2020). PlantDoc: A Dataset for Visual Plant Disease Detection. In Proceedings of the 7th ACM IKDD CoDS and 25th COMAD (pp. 249-253).
PlantDoc.imaging_conditions: Real-world field: variable lighting, backgrounds, angles, quality.
PlantDoc.role_in_project: CROSS-DOMAIN EVALUATION ONLY — never used for pretraining or fine-tuning.
PlantDoc.justification: The only large-scale publicly available plant disease dataset with genuine field conditions. Evaluation-only status ensures any accuracy improvement over generic I-JEPA reflects true generalisation, not in-distribution performance.

small_scale.implication_for_research: Cannot be used for training. Enforced programmatically in all data loaders.

label_noise.description: Crowdsourced annotations with estimated 10–15% label noise.
label_noise.implication_for_research: PlantDoc accuracy is a noisy lower bound. Small differences (<3%) on PlantDoc should not be over-interpreted.

incomplete_overlap.description: Only ~16 disease-crop combinations overlap with PlantVillage.
incomplete_overlap.implication_for_research: Cross-domain evaluation uses the intersection only. PlantDoc-exclusive classes constitute a zero-shot sub-experiment.
